acceptance_criteria.text: Growth workflow runtime routes are extracted from main.py into a blueprint without changing URL rules.
Duplicate-priority-sensitive stages routes are not moved in this iteration.
proof: main.py still owns the legacy duplicate stages handlers.

acceptance_criteria.text: Backend lint baseline includes import, route ownership, main.py ownership, and SQLite placeholder guardrails for the new blueprint.
Focused local tests and live smoke pass after deployment.
proof: raw/live-smoke-runtime.txt: app and worker up; root endpoint 200 OK.
gaps: Server host does not include tests, so host-side lint script is not an acceptance artifact.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_growth_workflow_routes.py tests/test_reports_api_routes.py tests/test_security_runtime_config.py tests/test_query_adapter.py
known_gaps: business/stages and admin/growth-stages still need a separate duplicate-priority-preserving extraction pass.
